Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Stats News Camps Additional Links

2025-2026 Men's Basketball Roster

24 DaJaun Young

  • Position Guard
  • Height 6-3
  • Class Sophomore
  • Hometown New Castle, Pa.
  • Highschool New Castle High School
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

2025-26
Second year for Edinboro... played in 9 games

2024-25
Appeared in 5 games for the Scots... recorded a total of 2 field goals, 1 three-pointer, 1 assist, and 5 points

High School
Two year varsity starter for basketball... played baseball... senior year went to states leading a 20-2 record and made the All-Section Team... Honors all four years

Personal
Son of Danielle Young-Frye... majoring in Sport Management
